title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Terrorist Affected Areas (Special Courts) Act, 1984. (2) It extends to the whole of India except the State of Jammu and Kashmir*. (3) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 14th day of July, 1984.
footnote: *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
